AM-ErrorResponse.name: AM-ErrorResponse
AM-ErrorResponse.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage name="AM-ErrorResponse">
    <Set>
        <Payload contentType="application/json"><![CDATA[
{
  "error": true,
  "fault_name": "{fault.name}",
  "fault_type": "{fault.type}",
  "fault_category": "{fault.category}",
  "organization": "{organization.name}",
  "environment": "{environment.name}",
  "username_configured": "{private.username}",
  "admin_pass": "{private.password}",
  "url_attempted": "http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/organizations/{organization.name}/environments/{environment.name}/keyvaluemaps",
  "troubleshooting": [
    "1. Verify your-management-server hostname is correct",
    "2. Verify port 8443 is accessible from Message Processors",
    "3. Check credentials in 'private' KVM are correct",
    "4. Test URL manually: curl -k -u username:password http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/organizations/{organization.name}/environments/{environment.name}/keyvaluemaps"
  ]
}
        ]]></Payload>
    </Set>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="response"/>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
</AssignMessage>

AM-SetResponse.name: AM-SetResponse
AM-SetResponse.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage name="AM-SetResponse">
    <Set>
        <Payload contentType="application/json">{kvm.response.body}</Payload>
        <Headers>
            <Header name="Content-Type">application/json</Header>
        </Headers>
    </Set>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="response"/>
</AssignMessage>

JS-CreateAuthHeader.name: JS-CreateAuthHeader
JS-CreateAuthHeader.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" name="JS-CreateAuthHeader">
    <DisplayName>JS-CreateAuthHeader</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://createAuthHeader.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>

KVM-GetCredentials.name: KVM-GetCredentials
KVM-GetCredentials.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<KeyValueMapOperations name="KVM-GetCredentials" mapIdentifier="devops-credentials">
    <ExpiryTimeInSecs>86400</ExpiryTimeInSecs>
    <Get assignTo="private.username">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>username</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
    <Get assignTo="private.password">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>password</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

ListKVMs.name: ListKVMs
ListKVMs.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ServiceCallout name="ListKVMs" async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true">
    <DisplayName>ListKVMs</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Request>
        <Set>
            <Headers>
                <Header name="Content-Type">application/json</Header>
                <Header name="Authorization">{auth.header}</Header>
            </Headers>
            <Verb>GET</Verb>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>kvm.list.response</Response>
    <Timeout>30000</Timeout>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
        <!--<Authentication>-->
        <!--    <Username>{private.username}</Username>-->
        <!--    <Password>{private.password}</Password>-->
        <!--</Authentication>-->
        <URL>http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/organizations/advana/environments/dev/keyvaluemaps</URL>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

processKVMs.name: processKVMs
processKVMs.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="60000" name="processKVMs">
    <DisplayName>processKVMs</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://JS-ProcessKVMs.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>
